response.justification: Bogdan has extensive software development experience (15+ years) and strong technical leadership in developer tooling, testing, and system design, with notable contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and geo-data platforms. However, his people management experience is limited to ad-hoc mentoring and team setup rather than formal leadership roles, and his industry experience is more aligned with web/mobile applications than mobile platform ecosystems. Mobile-platform knowledge is preferred but not strictly required.
strengths: Deep technical expertise in developer tools, testing infrastructure, and system design
Proven leadership in building and scaling engineering teams and dev-ops infrastructure
Strong background in open-source contributions and mentoring junior engineers
concerns: Limited formal people management experience (no clear track record of managing teams >3 people)
Industry focus appears misaligned with developer tools/build systems for mobile platforms
Background lacks direct experience with mobile-platform ecosystems or compiler/build systems
